_comment: Pre-biopsy diagnostic profile: palpable breast lump with BI-RADS 4-5 mammography, no histology yet. Engine should match WORKUP-SUSPECTED-BREAST and emit a Diagnostic Brief, NOT a Treatment Plan (CHARTER §15.2 C7).

suspicion.presentation: 52F with self-detected palpable_breast_mass in left upper-outer quadrant x 6 weeks. Diagnostic mammography shows birads_4_or_5 spiculated 2.4 cm mass with associated mammographic_abnormality (pleomorphic microcalcifications). Targeted breast US confirms hypoechoic irregular lesion with posterior shadowing. Mild ipsilateral axillary_lymphadenopathy (one 1.3 cm node, lost fatty hilum). No nipple_discharge, no skin_retraction, no peau_d_orange. No prior breast imaging.

history.family_history_breast_ovarian: mother dx breast ca age 61, no known BRCA testing
